EmailTemplate.name: ARRH - Client review pack
EmailTemplate.subject: Client review pack | Alliance Rural & Remote Health
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
NURSE SUMMARY PACK.
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Nurse [Nurse name] has completed all required documentation and is ready to commence the {!TR1__Job__c.Name} contract pending your approval.
Candidate details:
[Nurse name] [Nurse AHPRA number] [Skills] [Certificates] [Agreed travel details] [Agreed accomodation details] [Other details]
Please let us know if you're happy to proceed by replying to this email.
If you have any questions, you can always call us on 07 4998 5550.
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Rural & Remote Health
